sentence: El cielu ta claru güei pela mañana.
ipa: ˈel ˈθjelu ˈta ˈklaɾu ˈɡwei ˈpela maˈɲana
gloss_en: The sky is clear today in the morning.
notes: Predorsal ⟨c⟩ before front vowel [θ] 'cielu' and final atonic -o>-u 'cielu','claru' per garcia_arias2003; ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] and no vowel reduction per penny2002.

sentence: La nueche ye llarga nesti iviernu.
ipa: ˈla ˈnwetʃe ˈʝe ˈʎaɾɡa ˈnesti iˈbjeɾnu
gloss_en: The night is long this winter.
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'nueche' and word-initial L->[ʎ] 'llarga' per garcia_arias2003; copula 'ye' and final -u 'iviernu' per penny2002.

sentence: Los rapazos cuerren pela caleya del pueblu.
ipa: ˈlos raˈpaθos kweˈren ˈpela kaˈleʝa ˈdel ˈpweblu
gloss_en: The boys run down the village lane.
notes: Diphthong 'cuerren' [kwe-] and -LJ->[ʝ] 'caleya' per garcia_arias2003; ⟨z⟩ [θ] 'rapazos' and word-initial trill [r] per alarcos_llorach1994.

sentence: Coyí les llaves y les fabes na cocina.
ipa: koˈʝi ˈles ˈʎabes ˈʝ ˈles ˈfaβes ˈna koˈθina
gloss_en: I took the keys and the beans in the kitchen.
notes: Central feminine plural -es 'les llaves','les fabes' — the ALLA metaphonic plural, distinct from western -as — per garcia_arias2003; ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] and ⟨c⟩ [θ] per penny2002.

sentence: ¿Cuántos años tien to hermanu mayor?
ipa: ˈkuantos ˈaɲos ˈtjen ˈto eˈɾmanu maˈʝoɾ
gloss_en: How many years does your elder brother have?
notes: ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'años' and diphthong 'tien' [tjen] per garcia_arias2003; final -u 'hermanu' per penny2002.

sentence: El gatu ñeru duerme cabo del llume.
ipa: ˈel ˈɡatu ˈɲeɾu ˈdweɾme ˈkaβo ˈdel ˈʎume
gloss_en: The cat sleeps by the fire.
notes: Word-initial N->[ɲ] 'ñeru' and L->[ʎ] 'llume' — Asturleonese initial palatalisation — per garcia_arias2003; tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'duerme' per penny2002.

sentence: Nun quiero más pan nin quesu, gracies.
ipa: ˈnun ˈkjeɾo ˈmas ˈpan ˈnin ˈkesu ˈɡɾaθjes
gloss_en: I don't want more bread or cheese, thanks.
notes: Negator 'nun' and 'nin' per garcia_arias2003; diphthong 'quiero' [kje-] and final -u 'quesu' per penny2002; ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'gracies' per alarcos_llorach1994.

sentence: Falamos con Xuan y Xosé na fiesta.
ipa: faˈlamos ˈkon ˈʃwan ˈʝ ʃoˈsɛ ˈna ˈfjesta
gloss_en: We talked with Xuan and Xosé at the fair.
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'Xuan','Xosé' (not Castilian [x]) and F- retention 'Falamos' per garcia_arias2003; diphthong 'fiesta' [fje-] per penny2002.

sentence: La muyer merca cebolles nel mercáu.
ipa: ˈla muˈʝeɾ ˈmeɾka θeˈβoʎes ˈnel meˈɾkau
gloss_en: The woman buys onions at the market.
notes: -LJ->[ʝ] 'muyer' and central plural -es 'cebolles' per garcia_arias2003; ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cebolles' and 'mercar' (< to buy) per penny2002.

sentence: ¡Baxa aína y pieslla la puerta!
ipa: ˈbaʃa ˈaina ˈʝ ˈpjesʎa ˈla ˈpweɾta
gloss_en: Come down quickly and shut the door!
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'Baxa' and metathesised 'pieslla' [pjesʎa] per garcia_arias2003; tonic Ĕ>/ie/ 'pieslla','puerta' per penny2002.

sentence: Trés vaques pacen la yerba nel prau.
ipa: ˈtɾɛs ˈbakes paˈθen ˈla ˈʝeɾba ˈnel ˈpɾaw
gloss_en: Three cows graze the grass in the meadow.
notes: Central plural -es 'vaques' and ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'pacen' per garcia_arias2003; falling diphthong 'prau' [prau̯] and betacism 'vaques' [b] per penny2002.

sentence: El ferreru fizo una reya nueva.
ipa: ˈel feˈreɾu ˈfiθo ˈuna reˈʝa ˈnweba
gloss_en: The blacksmith made a new plough-blade.
notes: Word-initial trill [r] 'ferreru','reya' and ⟨z⟩ [θ] 'fizo' per garcia_arias2003; tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'nueva' per penny2002.

sentence: Llovía muncho cuando volvimos a casa.
ipa: ʎoˈbia ˈmuntʃo ˈkwando boˈlbimos ˈa ˈkasa
gloss_en: It rained a lot when we came home.
notes: Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'Llovía' per garcia_arias2003; betacism 'volvimos' [b] and 'muncho' per alarcos_llorach1994.

sentence: La neña garra una flor mariella.
ipa: ˈla ˈneɲa ˈɡara ˈuna ˈfloɾ maˈɾjeʎa
gloss_en: The girl grabs a yellow flower.
notes: ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'neña' and -LL->[ʎ] 'mariella' per garcia_arias2003; word-initial trill [r] and yod outcome 'mariella' [-je-] per penny2002.

sentence: ¿Ónde ta el caminu pa la ilesia?
ipa: ˈɔnde ˈta ˈel kaˈminu ˈpa ˈla iˈlesja
gloss_en: Where is the way to the church?
notes: Final -u 'caminu' per garcia_arias2003; simplified 'ilesia' (< iglesia) per alarcos_llorach1994.

sentence: El rapaz ruempe la rama del ñozal.
ipa: ˈel raˈpaθ ˈrwempe ˈla ˈrama ˈdel ɲoˈθal
gloss_en: The boy breaks the branch of the walnut tree.
notes: Word-initial N->[ɲ] 'ñozal' and tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'ruempe' per garcia_arias2003; ⟨z⟩ [θ] 'rapaz','ñozal' and trill [r] per penny2002.

sentence: Comimos fabada con chorizu y morciella.
ipa: koˈmimos faˈβaða ˈkon tʃoˈɾiθu ˈʝ moˈɾθjeʎa
gloss_en: We ate bean stew with chorizo and blood sausage.
notes: -LL->[ʎ] 'morciella' and ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chorizu' per garcia_arias2003; ⟨c⟩/⟨z⟩ [θ] and final -u 'chorizu' per penny2002.

sentence: La fonte cuerre cerca del molín vieyu.
ipa: ˈla ˈfonte ˈkwere ˈθeɾka ˈdel moˈlin bjeˈʝu
gloss_en: The spring runs near the old mill.
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'cuerre' and -LJ->[ʝ] 'vieyu' per garcia_arias2003; ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cerca', trill [r] and final -u 'vieyu' per penny2002.

sentence: El perru lladra tola nueche na corrada.
ipa: ˈel ˈperu ˈʎadɾa ˈtola ˈnwetʃe ˈna koˈraða
gloss_en: The dog barks all night in the yard.
notes: Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'lladra' per garcia_arias2003; trill [r] 'perru','corrada', final -u 'perru' and tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'nueche' per penny2002.

sentence: La lluna rellumba sobre los teyaos.
ipa: ˈla ˈʎuna reˈʎumba ˈsobɾe ˈlos teˈʝaos
gloss_en: The moon shines over the rooftops.
notes: Word-initial and -LL->[ʎ] 'lluna','rellumba' per garcia_arias2003; -LJ->[ʝ] 'teyaos' (< tejados) and trill [r] per penny2002.
